list.name: symbol
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT symbol FROM equity_market.trades ORDER BY symbol

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp AS time, trade_price FROM equity_market.trades WHERE symbol = '$symbol' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND data_quality_flag = 'OK' ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT minute_bucket AS time, open, high, low, close FROM equity_market.int_vwap WHERE symbol = '$symbol' AND $__timeFilter(minute_bucket) ORDER BY minute_bucket
SELECT minute_bucket AS time, avg_spread_bps, p95_spread_bps FROM equity_market.int_spread_analytics WHERE symbol = '$symbol' AND $__timeFilter(minute_bucket) ORDER BY minute_bucket
SELECT bucket_start AS time, bucket_volume AS volume FROM equity_market.int_volume_profile WHERE symbol = '$symbol' AND $__timeFilter(bucket_start) ORDER BY bucket_start
SELECT trade_size FROM equity_market.trades WHERE symbol = '$symbol' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND data_quality_flag = 'OK' LIMIT 100000

SELECT trade_date, open_price, high_price, low_price, close_price, total_volume, day_vwap, round(avg_spread_bps, 2) AS spread_bps, total_quality_issues, round(daily_return_pct, 3) AS return_pct FROM equity_market.mart_daily_summary WHERE symbol = '$symbol' ORDER BY trade_date DESC
SELECT event_time, source_table, issue_type, severity, details FROM equity_market.data_quality_issues WHERE symbol = '$symbol' AND $__timeFilter(event_time) ORDER BY event_time DESC LIMIT 100
